summary: Tested two targeted fixes: (1) getErr() error utility for React child errors, (2) custom zoom buttons on JobMap. Both fixes verified working. Crew and contractor logins succeed without crashes. Zoom +/- buttons visible and clickable on both dashboards with no console errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both fixes (getErr utility + zoom buttons) are working. Crew dashboard at /crew/dashboard and contractor dashboard at /contractor/dashboard both show zoom-in-btn and zoom-out-btn (data-testid). No 'Objects are not valid as React child' errors. No console errors during normal navigation.
